overall.description: Third-person game footage showing a character walking through a snowy forested landscape toward a rocky cliff edge overlooking water. The environment features heavy snow cover, large boulders, and dense evergreen trees transitioning to an open shoreline view.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy forest trail between large rock formations

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dense snowy forest with large rock formations on both sides. The ground is covered in snow with scattered rocks and patches of vegetation. Tall evergreen trees create a partial canopy overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky shoreline with view of water

events.description: dense forest opens up to reveal a body of water on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path with the shoreline and water now visible to the right

snow-covered rocky edge along the water

segments.scene_description: The forest opens up to reveal a rocky shoreline with a misty body of water visible on the right. The character continues walking along the snow-covered path as the dense tree cover gives way to more open terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep rocky incline leading to cliff edge

events.description: terrain becomes steeper as character begins ascending toward cliff edge

agents.ego_description: climbing up the steep snow-covered rocky slope toward the cliff edge

entered.detail: snow-covered slope between large rock walls
rocky outcrop at the edge of the cliff

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a steep snow-covered incline between large rock formations, approaching a cliff edge. The body of water remains visible in the distance to the right as the terrain becomes more rugged and elevated.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense snowy forest that gradually opens into a rugged cliffside overlooking a misty body of water. It begins with the character navigating a thick grove of evergreen trees and large rock formations, where the ground is a mix of deep snow and scattered vegetation. As the character advances, the dense canopy gives way to a more open terrain, revealing a rocky shoreline and a glimpse of the water to the right. The scene then shifts as the path becomes more rugged, leading the character up a steep, snow-covered incline between towering boulders. Finally, the camera ascends toward a high cliff edge, elevating the perspective to overlook the distant water.
